query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_events,
  MIN(createdAt) as first_event,
  MAX(createdAt) as last_event,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sessionId) as unique_sessions
FROM events;

  COUNT(*) as total_events,
  MIN(createdAt) as first_event,
